## Summary

Describe the change in one or two short paragraphs.

## Scope

- [ ] Small and focused
- [ ] No broad refactor mixed with feature work
- [ ] English and Portuguese public docs updated when needed

## Checklist

- [ ] I read the relevant project docs before editing
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I updated compatibility notes when behavior changed
- [ ] I reviewed provenance and copyright implications
- [ ] I did not copy substantial third-party code or documentation

## Validation

List the commands you ran, for example:

```text
cargo fmt --all --check
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
cargo test --workspace
```

## Roadmap Context

- Phase:
- Task:

## Notes

Include any translation mismatch, deferred follow-up, or known limitation that reviewers should understand.
